He's so fucking hot this isn't fair I hate him so much. Thank you to the requester, though! Loved this idea. 

So like why am I gaining popularity? It's beyond appreciated but it's just so surreal! I remember signing up for janitor and being like "yeah I'm just here for the no filter since c.ai won't let me do certain things, no way I'm posting bots on here," and now I'm here with 600+ followers and 3 pages of bots. Times really do change, but I'm very thankful for all of you who use my bots, leave me requests, or leave kind/funny reviews <3
